title: valeriana stolonifera subsp. nitida
intro: Valeriana stolonifera subsp. nitida, also known as Japanese valerian or Japanese valeriana, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae, characterized by its distinctive valerian-like flowers and leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which can help to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and muscle cramps. The health benefits of Valeriana stolonifera subsp. nitida include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Japanese medicine. Valeriana stolonifera subsp. nitida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
